CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-07-2018 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-26-2018 Continued To Dec-26-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

(Amended) Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Arbitration And To Stay Proceedings; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support Thereof
Off Calendar Nov-09-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT ALLY BANK's Amended Motion To Compel Arbitration And To Stay Proceedings is taken OFF CALENDAR. On November 1, 2018, the court was informed that the case settled. Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Clerk: Sean Kane, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported (302/RBU)

Motion For Preliminary Injunctiion And Memorandum Of Points And Authorities
Off Calendar Nov-01-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Andrew Elliot, Esq. 415-398-3344 of Severson & Werson for Defendant Ally Bank.
No Other Appearance.

RULING - The matter is Discussed. Counsel reports the matter is settled and a dismissal will be filed. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

PLAINTIFF MADELINE TURSKEY'S Motion For Preliminary Injunction (Public Injunctive Relief under Business & Professions Code section 17200 et seq.)

Off calendar. The case has settled.

Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Anthony Vaughn, CSR#6185, tonyvaughn@yahoo.com, Reported. =(302/HK)
